pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of maven-compiler-plugin do not support compiling for Java 21 targets.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace separate source and target configuration with the unified release configuration.
pom.xml.why_exists: The 'release' flag is the standard way to specify Java version in modern compiler plugins, replacing deprecated separate source/target flags.
